texto: A mystery." He smiled, his teeth a white gleam in the shadowed face. "I like mysteries.""Don't you have enough to do without going looking for trouble?""I especially like mysteries that involve trouble.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a M.J. Scott: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “A mystery." He smiled, his teeth a white gleam in the shadowed face. "I like mysteries.""Don't yo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, mystery, trouble pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trouble.
